title: What Befell Harthamah in the Course of His journey to Khurisin, and What Happened to 'Ali b. 'Isa and His Sons
description: to Khurasdn, and What Happened to 'Alf b. 'Isa and His Sons It has been mentioned that Harthamah went on his way on the sixth day after the one on which al-Rashid wrote for him his contract of appointment. Al-Rashid accompanied him on the first part of his journey and gave him a charge concerning what he required Harthamah to do. Harthamah did not pause for any reason en route, and publicly sent on to 'Ali b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
